meaning: n.调和,和谐,一致,齐唱,齐奏adj.[音]同度的,同音的
examples: In unison, they all shouted, Monday!
"Thank you, Boz!" they said in unison.
It's the smoke detector, they replied in unison.
Simon Moss, from Unison, said the move had come as a shock to staff.
But Unison union general secretary Dave Prentis said Mr Cameron's "warm words won't fool women".
